title: MARY'S PLACE SUPERVISED VISITATION AND SAFE EXCHANGE CENTER - 211info
text: SAVING GRACE MARY'S PLACE MARY'S PLACE SUPERVISED VISITATION AND SAFE EXCHANGE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers supervised visitation and safe exchange services at a neutral location to prevent direct contact between parents, primarily assisting families affected by domestic violence, sexual assault, child abuse, or stalking. Eligibility: Families with minor children. At least one parent must live within Deschutes County. Hours: By appointment only Email (541) 322-7460 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 322-7460 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: By appointment only Services: Parental Visitation Facilitation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
